name: DeepResearch2-MCP-Server
description: MCP Server for OpenAI Deep Research API integration

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Your OpenAI API key for Deep Research API access

DATABASE_URL.description: Database connection URL (provided by Heroku PostgreSQL addon)

addons.notes: The hobby-dev plan has a limit of 10,000 rows and 20 concurrent connections. For production use, consider upgrading to a higher-tier plan such as 'standard-0' or 'premium-0' to handle larger datasets and more connections.
